news.headline: Harris addresses topics in recorded interview with Fox News
Harris: Presidency Won't Continue Biden's Agenda
FoodMinds releases 2024 Conscious Consumption Index, offering insights on healthy, sustainable food systems worldwide.
news.summary: FoodMinds, a company based in Chicago, has released their signature global insights report known as the Conscious Consumption Index. This report explores how consumers across the world perceive and prioritize healthy and sustainable food systems. This index serves as a comprehensive resource for understanding consumer attitudes and behaviors towards food choices.

news.headline: Meta introduces TPO technique to enhance AI models' critical thinking before responding, improving clarity.
news.summary: Researchers from Meta have unveiled TPO, a novel method designed to train artificial intelligence models to engage in a form of cognitive reasoning prior to generating a response. This technique is aimed at fostering a more thoughtful and nuanced approach to AI responses, enabling the model to deliberate on potential answers before providing them. This development marks a significant advancement in AI technology and could potentially revolutionize how AI systems interact with and respond to human input.

news.headline: Nikkei: Early poll shows Japan's ruling LDP may lose majority
Tekion CEO Jay Vijayan honored by Goldman Sachs for 3rd consecutive year as top entrepreneur at Builders and Innovators Summit.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California, Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) is honoring Jay Vijayan, Founder and CEO of Tekion, as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2024 at the Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg. This marks the third consecutive year Jay has received this recognition. Chosen from various industries, Jay is being celebrated at this exclusive two-day event for his outstanding work. Tekion, under his leadership, is transforming the automotive retail industry with its cutting-edge cloud-native platform.

news.headline: Walker & Dunlop ventures into Hospitality Investment Sales with new senior managing director, aiming to expand across US.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop, Inc. revealed a significant development as it expands its operations into Hospitality Investment Sales by welcoming Jonathan (Jay) Morrow as senior managing director. Morrow's role will involve spearheading Walker & Dunlop’s hospitality division, overseeing the origination and implementation of hospitality investment sales and capital deployment nationwide. Operating out of New York, Morrow's appointment signifies the company's strategic shift towards diversification beyond its traditional focus on multifamily real estate, which has been instrumental in the firm's growth.

news.headline: Itaú Unibanco to present 3Q24 results on Nov 5 at 8am EST and 10am Brasília time in interactive meeting with Q&A. Register to join.
news.summary: In São Paulo on October 16, 2024, it was announced that on November 5th, at 8 a.m. EST and 10 a.m. Brasília time, the 3Q24 results will be presented in both Portuguese and English. The presentation will be interactive, including a Q&A session at the end. To participate in this meeting, interested individuals can register for the event using the provided link.

news.headline: Trump receives 50% of national vote, Harris receives 48%: Fox News poll
Man jailed for 20 years for leading $8.4 million Ponzi scheme. US prosecutors found Juan Tacuri guilty of defrauding investors.
news.summary: Juan Tacuri and his accomplices have been accused by US prosecutors of scamming investors out of a staggering $8.4 million in what appears to be a Ponzi Scheme.

news.headline: Settlement reached in LA Archdiocese child sexual abuse claims: $880 million to settle 1353 cases.
news.summary: Attorneys for the Plaintiff's Liaison Committee and Kirk Dillman, the Counsel for the Archdiocese of Los Angeles, have disclosed the approval of a preliminary settlement agreement in Los Angeles on October 16, 2024. This agreement involves a payment totaling $880 million to resolve legal matters revolving around 1353 cases.

news.headline: US weather agency adopts AI to enhance hurricane forecasts. Harnessing neural networks for increased accuracy.
news.summary: The organization, with a history of implementing machine learning technology, is now placing a strong emphasis on neural networks to enhance prediction accuracy.

news.headline: AI technology could enable deceased individuals to exist indefinitely.
Hims stock surged 22% over 2 days after FDA allowed compounded versions of Lilly's obesity drug, facing risk now.
news.summary: Hims stock surged by nearly 22% in just two days following the FDA's announcement permitting compounded versions of Lilly's drug for obesity. The positive news generated significant enthusiasm among investors. However, some caution is warranted regarding the recent rally in Hims & Hers shares.

news.headline: Oriental Rise Holding Limited prices IPO at $4/share, raising $7M through the sale of 1.75M shares on NasdaqCM as ORIS.
news.summary: In Ningde, China on October 16, 2024, Oriental Rise Holding Limited revealed the details of its initial public offering (IPO). The company, a key tea product supplier in mainland China, announced the pricing of 1,750,000 ordinary shares for the IPO at a rate of $4 per share. This set the total gross proceeds from the offering at $7 million, before accounting for underwriting discounts and offering expenses. The IPO, which is being undertaken with a firm commitment, will see the ordinary shares listed for trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "ORIS" starting October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Global Food Emulsifiers Market to grow by USD 999.4 Million 2024-2028, driven by bakery & confectionery demand - Technavio
news.summary: A recent report discusses the impact of artificial intelligence on the market, highlighting the Global Food Emulsifiers Market's projected growth of approximately USD 999.4 million between 2024 and 2028. According to Technavio, this market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate exceeding 5.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: S&P 500 hits new high, Nvidia stock closes at record level, Apple near buy point. Dow Jones Futures up.
news.summary: Futures for the Dow Jones indicate a positive trend as the S&P 500 reached a new peak on Monday. Notably, Nvidia's stock soared to an unprecedented closing high. Additionally, Apple is on the brink of reaching a potential buy point. These developments suggest a strong performance in the market, with the S&P 500 setting a new record level and Nvidia achieving a significant milestone with its stock value. Apple's imminent buy point also indicates a positive outlook for the company.

news.headline: Root One, the first storefront dispensary in Santa Maria Valley, will open in Guadalupe on Oct. 19, 2024, offering discounts, free food, and music to welcome the community.
news.summary: A new establishment called SLO CAL Roots is inviting the public to join in the festivities at the launch of its third dispensary, Root One, located in Guadalupe. The event is scheduled for Saturday, October 19, 2024. Attendees can look forward to discounts, complimentary food, and live music. This dispensary is notable for being the initial and solitary storefront cannabis vendor in the area, offering a unique opportunity for customers.

news.headline: Trump and Harris supporters are already filing lawsuits over the election results.
Nike seeks new paths for growth outdoors amid the increasing demand for sports apparel, aiming for an increase in revenue by 15%.
Adam Back believes Bitcoin's strength lies in its founder's anonymity, stating its value as a blend of hard money and digital gold.
news.summary: In a recent interview with Cointelegraph, Back elaborates on the reasons behind Bitcoin's significance, emphasizing its role as both a secure form of currency and a digital store of value.

news.headline: Crypto investors should be cautious of potential last drop before further rise, warns analyst.
news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.6%, the lowest level since the beginning of the year. The number of jobless individuals has decreased by 200,000, with the total number of unemployed people now at 2.3 million. Additionally, the economy added 350,000 new jobs in the past month, resulting in a 2% increase in the employment rate. This positive trend is attributed to various sectors experiencing growth, including manufacturing, technology, and healthcare. Analysts are optimistic about the future outlook of the job market based on these recent developments.

news.headline: Radiant Capital stops loans due to hack, losing around $58 million in cyber breach, according to an expert.
news.summary: An expert has stated that around $58 million has been compromised due to a cybersecurity breach at a lending protocol.

news.headline: Logansport Financial Corp. Q3 2024 net earnings: $192,000 ($0.31 per share), down from $371,000 in 2023. Total assets: $256.9 million.
news.summary: Logansport Financial Corp., the parent company of Logansport Savings Bank, announced their financial results for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The net earnings for this quarter were $192,000, equivalent to $0.31 per diluted share. This is a decrease from 2023 when earnings were $371,000 or $0.61 per diluted share. In the year-to-date comparison, the company reported net earnings of $808,000 for 2024, a decline from $1,501,000 in 2023. The diluted earnings per share for the nine months ending on September 30, 2024, were $1.32 in contrast to $2.46 in the same period in 2023. The total assets as of September 30, 2024, were $256.9 million, up from $244.3 million in 2023. Additionally, total deposits by September 30, 2024, were $216.6 million compared to $219.4 million at the same time last year. The company distributed dividends of $1.35 per share in the first nine months of 2024, a decrease from the $3.85 paid out in 2023, which had included a special dividend of $2.50 per share.

news.headline: NVIDIA GPUs boost quantum dynamics simulations, advancing quantum computing and material science with improved computational power.
news.summary: Using NVIDIA GPUs, researchers have improved quantum dynamics simulations, tackling computational hurdles and driving progress in quantum computing and material science. This advancement has significantly increased the efficiency and accuracy of simulations, paving the way for groundbreaking discoveries in these fields. The utilization of NVIDIA GPUs has resulted in a considerable decrease in simulation time, with some simulations running up to 10 times faster than before. This breakthrough has opened up new possibilities for exploring complex quantum systems and developing advanced materials, ultimately propelling the scientific community towards innovative solutions and technologies.

news.headline: AI boosts meeting transcript summaries, improving productivity in virtual meetings. Learn more about this innovative technology.
news.summary: Learn about the groundbreaking impact of AI technology on meeting transcript summarization, which can revolutionize productivity and collaboration in virtual meetings. By utilizing advanced AI models and tools, this innovation has the potential to significantly improve efficiency and communication during meetings. Visit the link for more information.

news.headline: Conservative Justices leaning towards San Fran in water quality dispute vs E.P.A., after arguments; heard on Wednesday.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the Supreme Court justices listened to arguments regarding a longstanding conflict between San Francisco and the E.P.A. concerning water pollution regulations.

news.headline: Colombian Finance Superintendent halts trading on Colombia Stock Exchange, offers to acquire 8.50% - 10.63% of Mineros shares.
news.summary: In Medellin, Colombia, Mineros S.A. has disclosed that the Colombian Superintendent of Finance has released a public notice concerning the submission of an application for a public tender offer to acquire approximately 8.50% to 10.63% of Mineros' ordinary shares. These shares will be purchased through the Colombia Stock Exchange at a set offering price. Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, MINEROS:CB) is the company making the announcement, which aims to acquire a significant portion of its issued and subscribed ordinary shares through this tender offer.

news.headline: KIOXIA introduces PCIe 5.0 NVMe E1.S SSDs for cloud and hyperscale environments.
news.summary: A new report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow at a rate of 4.2% in 2021, marking an improvement from the 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the pandemic. However, this growth is expected to be uneven across regions, with advanced economies forecasted to expand by 5.6% while emerging markets and developing economies are expected to grow by 3.7%. The report also highlights the significant disparities in vaccine access, with low-income countries facing challenges in securing an adequate supply. It emphasizes the need for continued policy support and international cooperation to ensure a more robust and inclusive recovery.

news.headline: Crown LNG files First Half 2024 Financial Statements on Form 6-K with SEC for subsidiary Crown LNG Holding AS.
news.summary: In London on October 16, 2024, Crown LNG Holdings Limited disclosed the unaudited financial statements of its subsidiary, Crown LNG Holding AS, for the six months ending June 30, 2024. The filing was submitted on Form 6-K to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and can be accessed on the SEC's website. Crown LNG specializes in LNG liquefaction and regasification terminal technologies designed for harsh weather conditions.

news.headline: BCD Power IC Market set to increase by $10.4B (2024-2028) due to smart home tech expansion, driven by AI- Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends has projected significant growth in the Global BCD Power IC Market. The market size is expected to increase by approximately USD 10.4 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 5% during this period. This data comes from Technavio's analysis, suggesting a promising future for the BCD Power IC Market driven by advancements in AI technology.

news.headline: Flatiron Realty Capital partners with UBS O'Connor for a co-investment strategy on residential transition loans. Janney served as financial advisor.
news.summary: Janney acted as the exclusive financial advisor to Flatiron Realty Capital, LLC in a recent transaction. Flatiron Realty Capital, LLC disclosed the launch of a cooperative investment approach highlighting residential transition loans (RTL). This strategy focuses on facilitating residential property transitions. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Partnership on AI released a report on AI transparency policies, analyzing 8 frameworks, aiming at global alignment.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Partnership on AI, a nonprofit organization focused on responsible AI, has released a report titled "Policy Alignment on AI Transparency." This report examines potential interoperability issues and possibilities in prominent AI policy frameworks amidst the swift evolution of AI governance measures. It offers a comparative assessment of eight key policy frameworks, such as the EU AI Act and the US Wh. The report aims to address the increasing importance of transparent AI regulation in light of current developments in this sector.

news.headline: Metal detector market to increase by $267.6 million (2024-2028) as AI advancements drive growth - Technavio's report.
news.summary: According to Technavio, the global metal detector market is expected to see significant growth from 2024 to 2028, with an estimated increase of USD 267.6 million. The market is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.2% during this period, reflecting the impact of artificial intelligence on market transformation.

news.headline: ANAHEIM DUCKS team up with Troutman Amin, LLP for branding initiative to win Stanley Cup quest. #DucksWinStanleyCup
news.summary: In Irvine, California on October 16, 2024, it was announced that Troutman Amin, LLP, Orange County's Business Law Firm, will be supporting the Anaheim Ducks with a new branding initiative. This initiative aims to assist the team in their efforts to reclaim the Stanley Cup. This collaboration signals a significant move for Anaheim Ducks fans and could potentially boost the team's performance in the upcoming seasons.

news.headline: Parkland Corp. (TSX: PKI) to report Q3 2024 results on Oct 30, 2024, followed by a 6:30 a.m. MT conference call.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 16, 2024, Parkland Corporation anticipates releasing its third-quarter results for 2024 after the market closes on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. The company's stock symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is PKI. Following the release, a conference call and webcast are scheduled at 6:30 a.m. MT.

news.headline: MongoDB announces redemption of $1,149,972,000 in outstanding convertible senior notes due 2026.
news.summary: MongoDB, Inc. disclosed on October 16, 2024, that it has initiated a redemption notice for its entire outstanding principal amount of $1,149,972,000 regarding the 0.25% convertible senior notes of the company. MongoDB is recognized as the primary modern general purpose database platform and operates under the ticker symbol Nasdaq: MDB.

news.headline: Silicone elastomers market to grow by USD 3.2 billion by 2028, driven by rising demand for implants. Powered by AI.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the role of AI in market transformation, revealing that the global silicone elastomers market is projected to increase by approximately USD 3.2 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research from Technavio suggests a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 5.9% during this period.

news.headline: AirBoss of America Corp. (TSX: BOS) will release Q3 earnings on Nov 6, 2024, followed by a conference call on Nov 7 at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: A company based in Newmarket, Ontario, AirBoss of America Corp. (TSX: BOS) (OTCQX: ABSSF), disclosed plans to unveil its third-quarter financial results on November 6, 2024, post-market hours. The ensuing conference call to deliberate on the outcomes will take place on November 7, 2024, at 9:00 am Eastern Time.

news.headline: Minerals Technologies raises quarterly dividend by 10% to $0.11/share, payable on Dec 5, 2024, with record date of Oct 31, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) declared a 10% rise in its regular quarterly dividend for its common stock, reaching $0.11 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on December 5, 2024, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2024.

news.headline: Buenaventura reports Q3 2024 production results: El Brocal - 6,673 gold ounces produced, Orcopampa - 17,831 gold ounces produced.
news.summary: Peru's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (NYSE: BVN; Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM), announced its 3Q24 results for production and volume sold. The company reported the following production per Metal for the three and nine months ending September 30, 2024: - Gold ounces produced at El Brocal: 6,673 (3Q24) and 17,329 (9M24)- Gold ounces produced at Orcopampa: 17,831 (3Q24) and 54,426 (9M24)The updated guidance for 2024 is as follows:- Gold ounces production target for El Brocal: 19.0k - 22.0k- Gold ounces production target for Orcopampa: 70.0k

news.headline: Black Stone Minerals, L.P. declares $0.375 per common unit distribution for Q3 2024, sets earnings call.
news.summary: In Houston, Black Stone Minerals, L.P. (NYSE: BSM) declared a common unit distribution of $0.375 for the third quarter of 2024, the same as the previous quarter. The distribution was approved by the Board of Directors of the general partner. The distribution will be payable in November. Additionally, the company announced the date for its third-quarter earnings call.

news.headline: Targa Resources Corp. releases Sustainability Report for 2023, highlighting performance in environmental, social, and governance topics.
news.summary: In Houston on October 16, 2024, Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) released its 2023 Sustainability Report, accessible on their website. The report showcases Targa's sustainability efforts, evaluating their performance in 2023 across environmental, social, and governance aspects crucial to their industry and operations. The report is now viewable at https://www.targaresources.com/sustainability, marking Targa's commitment to transparently sharing their sustainability initiatives and accomplishments from the past year.

news.headline: M&T Bank Corporation declares $0.3515625 quarterly cash dividends on series of perpetual preferred stock.
news.summary: Buffalo-based M&T Bank Corporation, identified as MTB on the NYSE, recently disclosed its quarterly cash dividends for some of its perpetual preferred stock. The declared dividend stands at $0.3515625 per share for its Perpetual Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative series.

news.headline: Aquatic feed market to increase by $4.73 billion (2024-2028) due to nutrient-rich foods and AI advancements.
news.summary: According to a report utilizing AI technology, the global market for aquatic feed ingredients and products is projected to witness significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 4.73 billion expected between 2024 and 2028. The market is forecasted to achieve a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) surpassing 5.8% during this period.

news.headline: Five Point Holdings, LLC appoints new director, Sam Levinson, from Glick Family Investments, following recent sale by Castlelake, L.P.
news.summary: Five Point Holdings, LLC, based in Irvine, California, revealed the addition of Sam Levinson from Glick Family Investments to its Board of Directors. Five Point, a company focused on developing mixed-use communities in coastal California, made this announcement following a disclosed sale by Castlelake, L.P. and related funds. Sam Levinson, who serves as the Chief Investment Officer at Glick, joins the Board to contribute to strategic decisions. Five Point, listed on NYSE as FPH, continues its operations in developing large-scale projects in the region.

news.headline: Cushman & Wakefield reprices $1.0 billion Term Loan, lowers interest rate by 50 bp to 3.25%, due 2030.
news.summary: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) has completed a successful repricing of around $1.0 billion of its Term Loan issued in April 2024 and due in 2030. The repricing has lowered the interest rate on the Term Loan by 50 basis points from Term SOFR plus 3.75% to Term SOFR plus 3.25%. The maturity of the loan remains unchanged, and all other terms remain largely the same. This move was announced in Chicago by the company.

news.headline: Ripple's event in Miami, but XRP supporters absent: Annual Ripple Swell with panels and gear for business attendees.
news.summary: The eighth annual Ripple Swell event organized by Ripple Labs attracted a primarily white-collar audience with panels and various offerings.

news.headline: North Korea's Constitution Defines South Korea as "Hostile" State: KCNA
Telerehabilitation systems market set to grow by $532.9 million (2024-2028) due to chronic disease rise and AI influence.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the transformation of the market landscape by AI. The global telerehabilitation systems market is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 532.9 million between 2024 and 2028, with a forecasted CAGR of 20%. This growth, as outlined by Technavio, indicates a significant redefinition in the market dynamics driven by AI technologies.
